title: AI market intelligence report
summary: Produce a decision-ready competitive analysis for a new enterprise AI product.

criteria.title: Analyze at least five direct competitors
criteria.description: Each competitor receives a substantive comparison.

criteria.title: Use sources published within 12 months
criteria.description: Older sources are identified and justified.

criteria.title: Include a current pricing comparison
criteria.description: Unknown private pricing is clearly labeled.

criteria.title: Provide three actionable recommendations
criteria.description: Each recommendation includes rationale and next action.

criteria.title: Disclose uncertainty and limitations
criteria.description: Missing evidence and competing interpretations are visible.
